# useToggle

A boolean switcher with utility functions.

**Package:** `@vueuse/shared`
**Category:** Utilities

## Usage

```ts
import { useToggle } from '@vueuse/core'

const [value, toggle] = useToggle()
```

## Reference

[VueUse Docs](https://vueuse.org/core/useToggle/)
